title: New 3x15 Scoring System to Debut in Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring format will be implemented across all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for junior categories in India.
summary: Badminton India has announced the implementation of a new 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in the U-13, U-15, and U-17 categories, set to debut at Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing strong form on the international stage.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open came to an end in the final, where he faltered at the last step against Su Li Yang.

title: Rounak Chouhan Stuns World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan created a significant upset by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open Super 300 by defeating the higher-ranked Chou Tien Chen.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Members Rejoin for Asian Games Preparations
indian_angle: Key members of India's successful Thomas Cup squad, including Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand, are reassembling to prepare for the upcoming Asian Games.
summary: India's Thomas Cup winning squad members have reconvened for the Asian Games, with the return of the women's doubles pair Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand highlighting the preparations.

title: Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Tournament Announced for Chennai
indian_angle: The upcoming Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament in Chennai is a key event for top Indian shuttlers to compete domestically.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has announced the Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026, scheduled to take place in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, from July 16th to 23rd, 2026.
